subagents.title: W2-AG Scoring Engineer
subagents.system_instruction: You are a scoring/evaluation systems engineer. Design per-agent scoring schemas and statistically sound reporting bundles. Prioritize deterministic outputs, payload backward compatibility, and explicit edge-case tests. You must specify exact response fields for server payloads and SSE emission.

parsed_output.summary: Implement evaluation payload changes with agent scores and reliability adjustments.

code_changes.purpose: Add agent_scores payload computation, reliability adjustment, and reporting bundle statistics.
operations: Insert function compute_agent_scores() to calculate individual agent scores.
Update execute_evaluation() to integrate reliability adjustment computation.
Add new reporting bundle generation for detailed stats.
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Existing payload structure remains unchanged; new fields are added only if requested, ensuring backward compatibility.

code_changes.purpose: Extend message contracts to include agent_scores and reporting bundle fields.
operations: Add agent_scores field in EvaluationResponse message.
Introduce reporting_bundle substructure with criteria, weights, and statistics.
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Old consumers will ignore new optional fields if not utilized, preserving existing API behavior.

tests.name: test_compute_agent_scores_correctness
tests.asserts: Verifies that agent scores are computed accurately based on input criteria.

tests.name: test_reporting_bundle_stats_integration
tests.asserts: Checks reporting bundle includes proper criteria, weights, and aggregated stats.

tests.name: test_backward_compat_agent_scores_absence
tests.asserts: Ensures that payloads without the new agent_scores field are still processed correctly.

risk_register.risk: New agent_scores field causing unexpected behavior in legacy clients
risk_register.mitigation: Implement additive schema evolution with optional fields and run comprehensive backward compatibility tests.
risk_register.validation: Review integration test results and monitor client interactions post-deployment.

acceptance_checks: All tests pass including edge-case and backward compatibility tests.
API consumers verify that existing payloads remain functional without new field usage.
Reporting bundle statistics reflect correct criteria distribution and adjustments.

subagents.title: W2-UI Engineer
subagents.system_instruction: You are a frontend engineer for React+TypeScript dashboards. Design compatibility-aware UI states and transparent score breakdown UX tied to backend payloads. Include explicit disabled/empty/error states and test assertions for hard gate visibility.

parsed_output.summary: Implements dataset selector compatibility states and transparent score breakdown UI backed by backend payloads.

code_changes.purpose: Filter dataset options and show disabled state if not compatible with workflow.
operations: edit DatasetSelector props to accept workflow string
apply compatibility filter to dataset list based on payload from GET /api/eval/datasets?workflow=...
show explicit disabled and empty UI state
propagate disabled state for incompatible datasets
code_changes.compatibility_notes: If no workflow prop provided, fallback retains default behavior with all datasets enabled.

code_changes.purpose: Display score criteria, weights, grade, and show hard gate failures; handle error/empty states.
operations: add rendering of criteria and weights from agent_scores payload
append explicit visualization of hard-gate failed criteria with error styling
show distinct empty/error UI when payload missing or malformed
code_changes.compatibility_notes: If agent_scores field missing, panel displays previous summary-only view as fallback.

tests.name: test_filters_datasets_by_workflow
tests.asserts: Only compatible datasets are enabled/visible per workflow value.

tests.name: test_dataset_selector_empty_and_disabled_state
tests.asserts: Displays explicit empty message and disables selector if no compatible datasets.

tests.name: test_score_breakdown_shows_criteria_and_hard_gate_failure
tests.asserts: Breakdown shows criteria/weights, individual grades, and marks failed hard gates distinctively.

tests.name: test_score_panel_error_state_on_malformed_payload
tests.asserts: Shows explicit error UI when agent_scores is missing or invalid schema.

risk_register.risk: Dataset selector disables all options for rare workflows
risk_register.mitigation: Show clear empty/disabled UI, add fallback for legacy workflows with no compatibility info.
risk_register.validation: UI test for empty and fallback selector state.

risk_register.risk: Score panel breaks on agent_scores schema evolution
risk_register.mitigation: Guard rendering with schema validation and fallback to summary-only view.
risk_register.validation: Test with missing/extra/malformed agent_scores payloads.

acceptance_checks: DatasetSelector disables/filters out incompatible datasets
ScoreBreakdownPanel renders criteria/weights/grades and hard-gate failures
Empty/disabled/error states are displayed explicitly for all relevant UI
APIs are backward compatible for legacy consumers

subagents.title: W2-AD Adapter Engineer
subagents.system_instruction: You are an integration adapter engineer. Design framework adapters with strict contract conformance and graceful optional dependencies. Explicitly define fallback behavior when the Microsoft SDK is unavailable.

parsed_output.summary: Enhance Microsoft adapter with optional import and canonical mapping.

code_changes.purpose: Implement optional behavior for Microsoft SDK integration and define canonical event mapping.
operations: Rename function `import_sdk` to `initialize_sdk` for clarity.
Add conditional checks to handle absent Microsoft SDK and fall back to default behavior.
code_changes.compatibility_notes: The function signatures remain the same, ensuring existing implementations continue to function without change.

tests.name: test_microsoft_adapter_initialization_with_sdk
tests.asserts: SDK initializes correctly when available.

tests.name: test_microsoft_adapter_initialization_without_sdk
tests.asserts: Fallback behavior is executed without errors when SDK is absent.

tests.name: test_microsoft_adapter_event_mapping
tests.asserts: Events are correctly mapped to canonical format regardless of SDK presence.

risk_register.risk: Microsoft SDK may not be installed on all environments.
risk_register.mitigation: Add checks for SDK availability and provide default behavior.
risk_register.validation: Run tests to verify that the fallback mechanism functions as expected in environments without the SDK.

acceptance_checks: SDK integration behaves as expected with and without the SDK present.

subagents.title: Wave2 Integration Architect
subagents.focus: Cross-ticket backend+SSE+UI contract integration for W2-AG-001/W2-UI-001/W2-UI-002/W2-AD-001
subagents.system_instruction: You are a cross-layer integration architect. Align backend evaluation payloads, streaming contracts, and UI rendering types. Prevent schema drift and call out required API/type updates.

parsed_output.summary: Backend and UI integration for evaluation scoring enhancements and dataset filtering.

code_changes.purpose: Add agent_scores payload and adjust reliability metrics.
operations: Add 'agent_scores' field to the response payload.
Integrate reliability adjustments within scoring calculations.
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Existing endpoints still return the previous structure if the new 'agent_scores' is not present.

code_changes.purpose: Update payload contracts to include new fields.
operations: Update schema to add 'agent_scores' to existing message.
Ensure backward compatibility by preserving original schema definitions.
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Fallback to original schema occurs for clients that do not send requests for new payload.

code_changes.purpose: Implement score breakdown panel and dataset filtering.
operations: Create score breakdown component to display criteria and weights.
Modify dataset selector to filter based on workflow compatibility.
code_changes.compatibility_notes: UI checks for compatibility before displaying filters, maintaining stability for unmodified workflows.

tests.name: test_agent_scores_payload
tests.asserts: Response contains 'agent_scores' field when applicable.

tests.name: test_dataset_selector_filters
tests.asserts: Filters correctly disable based on workflow compatibility.

tests.name: test_score_breakdown_panel
tests.asserts: Score breakdown correctly displays criteria and weights.

risk_register.risk: Backward compatibility issues with older clients.
risk_register.mitigation: Implement versioning and schema fallback logic.
risk_register.validation: Run regression tests against existing clients.

acceptance_checks: All features function under the current workflow without failures.

subagents.title: Wave2 QA Reviewer
subagents.focus: Wave 2 end-to-end regression and test coverage
subagents.system_instruction: You are a principal QA reviewer. Identify regression risks, missing tests, and release gates for Wave 2 integration. Require explicit backward-compatibility checks and failure-mode tests.

parsed_output.summary: Wave 2 integration regression and coverage assessment.

code_changes.purpose: Add agent_scores payload for improved reporting.
operations: Add 'agent_scores' to return payload structure
Adjust reliability calculation logic
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Existing response structure preserved, 'agent_scores' is added as a new field.

code_changes.purpose: Update report message structure to include new stats.
operations: Extend message schema to include new stats and metrics fields
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Backwards compatibility maintained through optional fields in response.

code_changes.purpose: Implement optional import behavior for Microsoft integrations.
operations: Refactor import logic to check for dependencies
Map canonical events conditionally based on import success
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Existing functionality will fallback to default handling if optional imports are not present.

tests.name: test_agent_scores_payload
tests.asserts: agent_scores is present in the API response when evaluated

tests.name: test_dataset_filtering_compatibility
tests.asserts: dataset selector respects workflow compatibility filters

tests.name: test_score_breakdown_with_edge_case
tests.asserts: correctly handles hard-gate failures in score breakdown

risk_register.risk: Payload changes leading to client incompatibility
risk_register.mitigation: Implement versioning in API payloads and document changes.
risk_register.validation: API response tests against different client versions.

risk_register.risk: Optional dependencies affecting event reliability
risk_register.mitigation: Ensure fallback logic is clearly defined and tested.
risk_register.validation: Run integration tests with and without optional dependencies.

acceptance_checks: All tests for W2-AG-001, W2-UI-001, W2-UI-002, and W2-AD-001 pass with 100% coverage.

subagents.evaluation_raw:
```json
{
  "criterion_scores": {
    "ticket_alignment": 8,
    "implementation_depth": 7,
    "testability": 6,
    "backward_compatibility": 8,
    "repo_alignment": 9,
    "risk_management": 7,
    "specificity": 7
  },
  "overall_score": 7,
  "verdict": "adequate",
  "key_findings": [
    "Ticket alignment is strong overall with clear mappings to relevant tickets.",
    "Implementation depth is substantial, but further detail on integration tests could enhance clarity.",
    "Test cases cover required scenarios, although edge case coverage could be improved.",
    "Backward compatibility noted but lacks specific versioning strategy details.",
    "Risk management adequately considers and outlines mitigations, but implementation could include more specific edge case tests."
  ],
  "blocking_issues": [
    "Specific integration tests for the optional Microsoft framework scenario are absent.",
    "Lack of detailed file paths or expected outcomes for some tests reduces clarity."
  ],
  "next_actions": [
    "Add additional integration tests specifically targeting the optional imports.",
    "Provide clearer paths for edge cases to enhance testability.",
    "Consider expanding the risk register to include further mitigation strategies for identified risks."
  ]
}
```

key_findings: Ticket alignment is strong overall with clear mappings to relevant tickets.
Implementation depth is substantial, but further detail on integration tests could enhance clarity.
Test cases cover required scenarios, although edge case coverage could be improved.
Backward compatibility noted but lacks specific versioning strategy details.
Risk management adequately considers and outlines mitigations, but implementation could include more specific edge case tests.
blocking_issues: Specific integration tests for the optional Microsoft framework scenario are absent.
Lack of detailed file paths or expected outcomes for some tests reduces clarity.
next_actions: Add additional integration tests specifically targeting the optional imports.
Provide clearer paths for edge cases to enhance testability.
Consider expanding the risk register to include further mitigation strategies for identified risks.

operations: Add 'agent_scores' to return payload structure
Revise reliability calculation logic to handle edge cases

operations: Extend response schema to include new stats fields with optional usage
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Backward compatibility is maintained with optional fields and documented versioning strategy.

code_changes.purpose: Clarify optional import behavior in Microsoft integrations.
operations: Refactor import logic to confirm optional dependency presence

subagents.title: Wave2 Adversarial Reviewer
subagents.focus: Negative-path and adversarial failure-mode analysis for W2-AG-001/W2-UI-001/W2-UI-002/W2-AD-001
subagents.system_instruction: You are a red-team reliability reviewer for software delivery plans. Focus on breakpoints, malformed payloads, missing optional dependencies, and schema mismatch regressions. Demand concrete negative-path tests.

code_changes.purpose: Add robust handling for agent_scores payload and improve reliability.
operations: Add explicit validation for agent_scores structure to include field types and required fields.
Implement fallback to default scores when agent_scores is missing or malformed, ensuring no system crash.
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Existing evaluations without agent_scores will maintain their functionality without any additional input requirements.

code_changes.purpose: Improve clarity and enforce schema versioning for backward compatibility.
operations: Enhance payload schema definition to include explicit versioning field (e.g., 'schema_version').
Clearly document optional fields including agent_scores in the schema, detailing data types and expected formats.
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Clients operating on previous schema versions will ignore new fields while maintaining existing functionality.

code_changes.purpose: Ensure handling of queries with invalid workflow compatibility.
operations: Return a structured error response for invalid workflows instead of empty results.
Implement user-facing messaging that clearly explains the incompatibility when querying workflows.
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Queries with valid workflows will receive identical responses as per existing design.

tests.name: test_add_agent_scores_payload_null_structure
tests.asserts: Ensure system handles null and malformed agent_scores structure gracefully without crashes.

tests.name: test_dataset_selector_invalid_workflow_response_structure
tests.asserts: Assert that an explicit error message is returned for invalid workflow query instead of an empty dataset.

tests.name: test_score_breakdown_unspecified_criteria
tests.asserts: Verify that an appropriate error is raised when no criteria are specified.

risk_register.risk: Malformed payloads causing failures in evaluation.
risk_register.mitigation: Implement strict validation for all incoming payload structures, including both format and required field checks.
risk_register.validation: Automated tests on various malformed payloads should assert consistent error responses without application crashes.

risk_register.risk: Failure in handling optional dependencies correctly.
risk_register.mitigation: Enhance checks for optional dependency availability and provide user-friendly default behavior.
risk_register.validation: Introduce test cases for scenarios where optional dependencies are missing, ensuring defaults are correctly applied.

acceptance_checks: All tests pass without regressions; zero system failures on invalid inputs; clear error responses for incompatible queries.

}

Most code changes and their purposes are clearly defined, with notable attention to backward compatibility and implementation depth.
Test cases are well-defined and cover edge cases, signifying good testability.

next_actions: Add more specifics on mitigation validation strategies to enhance risk management clarity.

code_changes.purpose: Add agent_scores payload handling for robustness and reporting.
operations: Add validation for agent_scores payload structure.
Implement fallback for missing agent_scores to avoid system crash.
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Existing evaluations without agent_scores will continue to function as before.

code_changes.purpose: Ensure backward compatibility in extended payload.
operations: Modify payload schema to include optional agent_scores field.
Add schema versioning field for better evolution and validation.
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Clients without agent_scores support will ignore the new field, preserving prior behavior.

code_changes.purpose: Add filter compatibility checks for missing workflows.
operations: Return empty dataset collection when specified workflow is incompatible.
Implement fallback messaging for users querying incompatible workflows.
code_changes.compatibility_notes: Users querying valid workflows will experience no changes in response.

tests.name: test_add_agent_scores_payload_missing
tests.asserts: Handling of missing agent_scores defaults to previous behavior.

tests.name: test_dataset_selector_incompatible_workflow
tests.asserts: Empty dataset response when querying without valid workflow filter.

tests.name: test_score_breakdown_invalid_criteria
tests.asserts: Score breakdown returns appropriate errors for invalid criteria inputs.

risk_register.risk: Malformed payloads causing failures in evaluation.
risk_register.mitigation: Implement strict validation for all incoming payload structures.
risk_register.validation: Automated tests on various malformed payloads should assert proper error responses.

risk_register.risk: Optional dependencies not being handled correctly.
risk_register.mitigation: Add checks for optional dependency availability and provide default behavior.
risk_register.validation: Test cases for scenarios where optional dependencies are missing.

acceptance_checks: All tests must pass with no regressions on existing behaviors.
